subcodes.title: Words to Myron Phelps and Madame Canavarro in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: Teach them as the truths contained in their own religion... It is your sufferings and your faith in God which have brought you to the true spiritual insight
subcodes.subjects: @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @methods of teaching the Cause, @oneness; unity of religion, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion
